mapper.select: SELECT o.id, o.order_no AS orderNo, o.order_status AS orderStatus, o.total_amount AS totalAmount, o.pay_amount AS payAmount, o.freight_amount AS freightAmount, o.pay_type AS payType, o.delivery_type AS deliveryType, o.paid, o.pay_time AS payTime, o.deliver_time AS deliverTime, o.receive_time AS receiveTime, o.finish_time AS finishTime, o.create_time AS createTime, o.note, o.after_sale_flag AS afterSaleFlag, o.refund_status AS refundStatus, o.refund_price AS refundPrice, o.refund_time AS refundTime, o.receiver_name AS receiverName, o.receiver_phone AS receiverPhone, o.receiver_detail AS receiverDetail FROM mall_order o WHERE o.order_no = #{orderNo} AND o.user_id = #{userId}
